Module me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.core
Package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.tween.settings

Class FlixelTweenSettings

java.lang.Object
me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.tween.settings.FlixelTweenSettings
public class FlixelTweenSettings extends Object
Class for holding basic data, containing configurations to be used on a FlixelTween.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static interface 
    FlixelTweenSettings.FlixelTweenGoalVisitor
     
    static final record 
    FlixelTweenSettings.FlixelTweenPropertyGoal
    A record containing a getter, a target value, and a setter for a property-based tween goal.
    static final record 
    FlixelTweenSettings.FlixelTweenVarGoal
    A record containing basic info for a FlixelVarTween goal (aka a field to tween a numeric value to).

  • Constructor Details

    • FlixelTweenSettings

      public FlixelTweenSettings()

    • FlixelTweenSettings

      public FlixelTweenSettings(@NotNull @NotNull FlixelTweenType type)
      Parameters:
      type - The type of tween it should be.

    • FlixelTweenSettings

      public FlixelTweenSettings(@NotNull @NotNull FlixelTweenType type, @Nullable FlixelEase.FunkinEaseFunction ease)
      Parameters:
      type - The type of tween it should be.
      ease - The easer function the tween should use (aka how it should be animated).

  • Method Details

    • addGoal

      public FlixelTweenSettings addGoal(String field, float value)
      Adds a new goal to tween an objects field value to using reflection.

      Note that this is only used on a FlixelVarTween.

      Parameters:
      field - The field to tween.
      value - The value to tween the field to.
      Returns:
      this tween settings object for chaining.

    • addGoal

      public FlixelTweenSettings addGoal(@NotNull FlixelTweenSettings.FlixelTweenPropertyGoal.FlixelTweenPropertyFloatGetter getter, float toValue, @NotNull FlixelTweenSettings.FlixelTweenPropertyGoal.FlixelTweenPropertyFloatSetter setter)
      Adds a new property goal that tweens a value via a getter and setter rather than direct field access. This allows side effects (bounds updates, listeners, etc.) to fire naturally through the setter on every interpolated step.

      The getter is called once at tween start to capture the initial value. Each subsequent update interpolates from that captured value toward toValue and passes the result to the setter.

      Parameters:
      getter - Supplies the current value of the property at tween start.
      toValue - The value to tween the property to.
      setter - Consumes the interpolated value on every tween update.
      Returns:
      this tween settings object for chaining.

    • addGoal

      public FlixelTweenSettings addGoal(@NotNull @NotNull FloatSupplier getter, float toValue, @NotNull FlixelTweenSettings.FlixelTweenPropertyGoal.FlixelTweenPropertyFloatSetter setter)
      Adds a new property goal using the shared FloatSupplier interface.
      Parameters:
      getter - Supplies the current value of the property at tween start.
      toValue - The value to tween the property to.
      setter - Consumes the interpolated value on every tween update.
      Returns:
      this tween settings object for chaining.

    • setDuration

      public FlixelTweenSettings setDuration(float duration)
      Sets the duration of how long the tween should last for.
      Parameters:
      duration - The new value to set.
      Returns:
      this tween settings object for chaining.
